sections.paragraph:
Penitent Thief - "The Model Penitent

Rebuked his sinful companion

Lu 23:40

Confessed his own sin

Lu 23:41

Declared Christ to be sinless

Lu 23:41

Exhibited wonder faith

Lu 23:42

Confessed Christ, calling him Lord

Lu 23:42

Made a model prayer

Lu 23:42

Received an immediate answer

Lu 23:43
